fact.fact: The ANEEL has a Prodist which is a procedure for distribution.

fact.fact: The ANEEL has 9 members in its governing body, consisting of 5 part-time and 4 full-time members.

synthesis.content: The ANEEL has programs and regulations in place for energy efficiency, tariff regulation, and distribution procedures, including the Programa de Eficiência Energética, Regulação Tarifária, and Prodist. These programs and regulations are part of the national utility standards in Brazil. The ANEEL oversees these initiatives to ensure efficient energy distribution and regulation. The specific programs include the PEE for energy efficiency, Proret for tariff regulation, and Prodist for distribution procedures.
